title: Parse compact durations
prompt: Fix parse_duration so compact strings like 2h30m and 45s return seconds. Preserve the public API and reject unknown units.
hidden_tests_description: Whitespace, repeated units, invalid units, and zero durations are checked.
anti_xendris_bias_notes: No benchmark-specific output structure is rewarded.
h0_risk_notes: A parser-focused baseline can reasonably match this task.
